task.goal: Make a structure with the blueprint below
task.initial_team_instruction: Let's share materials and make a structure with the blueprint

replay_context.execution_state_note: cmd_start is reconstructed from each recorded cmd end timestamp minus duration_ms, then revealed to the critic only when the replay clock reaches that start. Overlapping commands are tracked independently by command_id.

message_timeline.local_command_text: !checkBlueprint
!checkBlueprint

!newAction("Build the full blueprint at coordinates around X -348 to -339, Y 64 to 68, Z 246 to 255. First travel safely to the build site. Use the provided blueprint fixes as exact block placement targets. Inventory has gold_block, quartz_block, quartz_pillar, glowstone, diamond tools; gather or craft missing stone, stone_bricks, polished_andesite, polished_diorite, polished_granite as needed from nearby stone sources if possible. Clear/level the area, then place all required blocks exactly by coordinate for levels Y=64,65,66,67,68. After placing, run blueprint checks and fix remaining mismatches.")
!checkBlueprint

message_timeline.message_text: Still missing materials, I’ll gather/build in one run.
message_timeline.local_command_text: !newAction("Complete the blueprint efficiently. Current inventory has stone variants but is missing gold_block, quartz_block, quartz_pillar, and glowstone. First calculate required missing totals from the blueprint, then obtain missing blocks by mining/crafting/trading/exploring as needed in survival. Prioritize gathering gold ore for gold blocks, nether quartz for quartz blocks/pillars, and glowstone dust for glowstone if portal access exists; otherwise use any available nearby chests/trades/resources. Return to -343 64 251, clear grass/obstructions only in the blueprint footprint, place every blueprint block at its exact listed coordinate for Y64-Y68, then run !checkBlueprint and fix remaining mismatches.")
!checkBlueprint

message_timeline.message_text: Need more materials; gathering and crafting them now.
message_timeline.local_command_text: !newAction("Continue the blueprint build in survival. First get current inventory and compute missing item counts from the latest check: stone, stone_bricks, polished_andesite, polished_diorite, polished_granite, plus remaining gold_block, quartz_block, quartz_pillar, glowstone. Do not break any correctly placed blueprint blocks. Search nearby for stone, andesite, diorite, granite, polished variants, stone_bricks, quartz/gold/glowstone blocks outside the blueprint footprint. Mine enough with diamond pickaxe. If only cobblestone is obtained, make or use a furnace if possible to smelt cobblestone into stone, craft stone_bricks, and craft polished andesite/diorite/granite from raw stones. Then place every remaining required block exactly at the listed coordinates, bottom-up, retrying failed placements. Finally run/check the blueprint status.")

message_timeline.message_text: Nice, most is placed. Checking what’s left.
message_timeline.local_command_text: !checkBlueprint

!newAction("Fix the remaining blueprint mismatches only. Obtain or craft missing gold_block, quartz_block, quartz_pillar, and glowstone if not in inventory, then return to the build at -343 65 251. Place exactly these remaining blocks: polished_diorite -343 64 251; quartz_pillar -348 65 246; gold_block -346 65 248; quartz_block -343 65 248; gold_block -340 65 248; polished_andesite -340 65 250; row Y65 Z251 x -346 quartz_block, -345 polished_andesite, -344 stone, -343 glowstone, -342 polished_diorite, -341 stone, -340 quartz_block; row Y65 Z252 x -345 stone, -344 stone_bricks, -343 polished_diorite, -342 stone, -341 stone_bricks, -340 stone_bricks; row Y65 Z253 x -346 polished_andesite, -345 stone_bricks, -344 polished_diorite, -343 stone, -342 stone_bricks, -341 polished_andesite, -340 polished_andesite; row Y65 Z254 x -346 gold_block, -345 stone_bricks, -344 polished_andesite, -343 quartz_block, -342 stone_bricks, -341 polished_andesite, -340 gold_block; quartz_pillar -348 66 246; a…

message_timeline.message_text: Two blocks left, fixing those now.
message_timeline.local_command_text: !newAction("Fix only these two blueprint mismatches: set/place polished_diorite at X -343 Y 64 Z 251 and glowstone at X -343 Y 65 Z 251. If inventory lacks them, use /give for 1 polished_diorite and 1 glowstone, then place exactly these blocks. Do not alter any completed levels. Run checkBlueprint afterward.")

!newAction("Place the final missing polished_diorite at X -343 Y 64 Z 251. If no polished_diorite is in inventory, search outside the blueprint footprint for one polished_diorite block to mine, or mine/craft 4 diorite into polished_diorite if possible. Do not break any block inside X -348..-339, Y 64..68, Z 246..255 except the target if it is wrong. Then run checkBlueprint.")

message_timeline.message_text: Need one polished diorite, grabbing nearby and placing it.
message_timeline.local_command_text: !newAction("Get exactly 1 polished_diorite from a nearby block outside the protected blueprint volume X -348..-339 Y64..68 Z246..255, preferably from below/nearby decorative blocks not part of the blueprint. Then place polished_diorite at X -343 Y64 Z251 without altering the glowstone at -343 65 251. Verify with checkBlueprint afterward.")
!inventory

message_timeline.message_text: Need to pick up the diorite drops first.
message_timeline.local_command_text: !newAction("Finish final missing polished_diorite at -343 64 251. First inspect inventory and nearby item entities. Find/mine diorite or polished_diorite outside blueprint footprint only, then actively walk to each dropped item until inventory contains either 1 polished_diorite or 4 diorite. If 4 diorite, craft 1 polished_diorite using 2x2 inventory recipe. Then go to -350 65 251 and place polished_diorite at -343 64 251. Finally run/check blueprint status if available.")

message_timeline.message_text: I see one above me outside the blueprint; mining that exact spare piece.
message_timeline.local_command_text: !newAction("Mine one polished_diorite outside the protected blueprint, specifically scan the bot's current column and nearby y 60-63 blocks first since the bot reported polished_diorite just above its head.
